scope: zero-training attribution of sparse composition count-partition failure

decision_rule.split_shift: If the empirical train-to-validation conditional partition TV exceeds 0.10, do not attribute the parent failure solely to optimization.
decision_rule.optimization: If empirical conditional TV is at most 0.10 but model-to-train conditional TV is large, the finite one-pass optimization or factorization is the primary failure.
decision_rule.representation: If partition encoding is injective but count NLL and partition TV fail while support/species improve, replace only the interleaved count factorization with a versioned stoichiometry-first exact partition state.
decision_rule.boundary: This audit takes no optimizer step and cannot authorize assignment, L1/M1, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
